name: T-1 Perpetual Motion Machine
descs:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that gain [Charge] Count or 'Unique Charge'. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

Turn Start: all allies gain 7 [ChargeForceField]. (once per wave)

Turn Start: all allies gain (([Charge] Count)/5 +1) [AttackDmgUp]. (max 9, rounded up; including 'Unique Charge')

Each Identity gains (total [Charge] Count consumed by using Attack Skills during this Encounter / 4) Offense Level Up at Turn Start. (maxes out after consuming 40 [Charge] Count)

Each Identity gains 1 [Charge] every time they consume 10 [Charge] Count. (5 times per Identity per Encounter; does not interact with 'Unique Charge' with fixed Potency)

Turn Start: all allies gain 1 [Enhancement] for every 2 [Charge] Potency on their respective selves (max 3)
